title: Device Settings - Do Not Disturb
scenario: Verify the Do Not Disturb feature in Device Settings can be toggled ON/OFF, with corresponding LED behavior on the headset.
steps: Launch the app and pair the device.
Navigate to Device Settings > Do Not Disturb tab.
Verify the tab is present and expanded with a toggle and description: "Enable the indicator on your headset to inform others that you are not to be interrupted."
Verify the toggle changes and LEDs on the headset blink red (requires Wear Sensor to be turned off).
Verify the toggle changes and LEDs turn off.
expected: The Do Not Disturb tab is present and expanded with a toggle and description. When toggled ON, the toggle changes and LEDs on the headset blink red. When toggled OFF, the toggle changes and LEDs turn off.
